description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring five stories above a ground floor. The front facade is characterized by a series of balconies with railings, each corresponding to an apartment unit, and a central vertical strip of brown accent panels. The ground floor includes a main entrance and what appears to be a garage or commercial space with a wide opening. The side and rear facades are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, and are finished in a light gray material. The roof includes a raised utility structure, likely for elevator or mechanical access. The overall design is functional and modern, with a focus on symmetry and regularity in the window and balcony arrangement.
description: A modern, five-story apartment building with balconies on the front facade and a flat roof, featuring a central entrance and plain side and rear walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing balconies, central brown accent panels, main entrance, and ground-level garage or commercial opening.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, windowless gray wall and the protruding rooftop utility structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a completely featureless, flat gray wall and the rooftop structure visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wall and rooftop utility structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on each floor, grouped in pairs for each apartment unit, and aligned vertically with the balconies.
